svg.text: KubeVirt Live Migration: VMIM → precopy → cutover (atomic) → resume on target
swimlane across 6 actors; time runs left to right; cutover band = the only true VM downtime window
VM still RUNNING on source; libvirt streams dirty pages
qemu still on /dev/kvm; pages dirtied continuously
vCPUs not yet running; memory being filled
source migration-proxy: UDS → TCP → target migration-proxy
target migration-proxy: TCP → UDS into target libvirtd
memory dirty page stream over migration-proxy (libvirt PEER2PEER + TUNNELLED)
shared RBD: read/write from source guest, no copy needed
target hasn't issued I/O yet (qemu paused)
if dirty_rate >= bandwidth: AUTO_CONVERGE throttles vCPU,
else if POSTCOPY flag set: switch to postcopy; else abort
CNI ARP refresh, cilium policy recalc
